critical_code_review_comments: LandingPage.jsx: Prices correctly set - Solo (39/390/32), Croissance (189/1890/157), Flotte Pro (489/4890/407)
server.py: SUBSCRIPTION_PLANS correctly updated with monthly_price and yearly_price
server.py: log_action() function implemented and called on login, create_driver, update_delivery, create_damage_report, update_subscription
server.py: GET /api/audit-logs endpoint returns company-filtered logs with admin role check
LegalPages.jsx: Section 9 (Disclaimer — Statut réglementaire) with e-CMR homologation warning in amber box
LegalPages.jsx: Section 10 (Audit et traçabilité) explaining 5-year log retention

index.html: PWA meta tags (apple-mobile-web-app-capable, manifest link)
manifest.json: Correct PWA configuration with name, icons, theme_color
service-worker.js: Cache-first for static, network-first for API calls
index.js: Service worker registration on load
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 18 verified Phase 1 mega-build. Key prices: SOLO 39€/mois or 390€/an, CROISSANCE 189€/mois or 1890€/an, FLOTTE PRO 489€/mois or 4890€/an. Founder badge: 'Tarif privilégié avant homologation complète'. Pain section: litiges injustifiés, gasoil qui s'évapore, amendes 50€ loi 2026. Audit logs: log_action() on login/create_driver/update_delivery/create_damage_report/update_subscription. PWA: manifest.json + service-worker.js + registration in index.js. SEO: meta description, og:title, twitter:card. CGU: section 9 (e-CMR disclaimer), section 10 (audit/traçabilité). All dashboards working.
